entry.title: Re: C4C Mashups: How to return data from a mashup
entry.content: Is something like this possible in SAP Sales Cloud V2?

entry.title: Re: Set up of Accrual condition type REA1 in Standard pri...
entry.content:
Hi @Narendar_Bureddy, 

For the line of your accrual condition type in the billing document pricing procedure, the recommendation would be: 

Where?: Based on your requirement
Condition type?: REA1 (or any custom) 
From/To?: Based on your requirement 
Subtotal?: Not required - Depend on your requirements
Routine?: Recommended to use Alt Cndn Base value 213 to be based the basis maintained in your contract
Account/Accrual key?: 0S1 (or any custom based on your config)  

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: unable to use targetElement within ui.facet when exte...
entry.content: the alias _ViewAddressTP is used as described above in targetElement in the metadata extension for the standard cds

entry.title: Re: Issue with Employee History Salary Field for Hourly P...
entry.content: I wonder why in your explanation you say that you do NOT have an annualization factor on the Hourly pay component ? I understand that there is an EC feature that makes EC PCG sums work without it but what would be the impact if you did add one ? Could you try that and add 2080 as annualization factor for the hourly pay component then relaunch Variable Pay employee history ? @MariaCarlotaAbreu @gregwilliams

entry.title: Re: How to influence Community 2024 developments?
entry.content:
You can always send us an email at community@sap.com.
Or provide it in questions here. We try to answer as many as we can personally. 

We are aware that the process for how we receive and handle feedback has not been very public this year, but we have heard all of you, both here and on other non-SAP platforms, and we have captured the feedback as enhancement requests.

More information on the feedback process for 2025 will follow next week.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Context Help in SAP Enable Now Producer 2406
entry.content: Hi Barth, how did you manage to see the selection of parameters with TCODE etc. by testing the context.html file?

entry.title: Re: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various app...
entry.content: Good morning Hakan, I have followed your recommendations and I have linked the UAA services of the respective applications to my app and CAP service At first it added all the UAA to my xs-security and made sure that when consumed it was reflected in the scope, however this does not work. When you add one by one and deploy each iteration it starts working however it gets to the point where it adds a certain application to xs-security and it fails and this sets me back We see the following error in the Server logs Error: Jwt token with audience: ['uaa','sb-uaaemployeetimes!t3247','ZHCM_CAP_EMPLOYEECENTRAL!t3247','uaaemployeetimes!t3247'] is not issued for these clientIds: [ 'sb-uaajobscheduler!t3247', 'uaajobscheduler!t3247']. I think my xs-security is wrong In my xs-security of my application I have the ReadPolicies scope. In this scope I give authorization to the UAA application type services In each of these UAA services I give authorities for my application and for the UAA services am I right? I have updated my posts where I add the images of my respective xs-security Thank you very much for your help

entry.title: Re: "Service does not exist" while creating IAM app in ec...
entry.content: It should not be necessary to release the service binding. This would be needed if the the IAM app and the service binding are in different software components.

entry.title: Re: Hide / personalize tiles in the Enable Now Manager
entry.content:
Hi Steven, on the SEN Manager Home screen (which displays when you click the SAP logo in the SEN Manager), a Learner sees three tiles: Learner View, What's New, and Settings. You're right, the tiles are controlled by Permissions, but that's the only way to control them - it's not a true Fiori interface where the tiles are editable by the Admin. They added the tiles to make it look more consistent with other Fiori-interface SAP products, but the tiles are not editable/addable/removable except through the Permissions that control them. The What's New tile is a link to the SAP Enable Now Info Center and the current SEN version overview slides, and you're right, a Learner doesn't have access to that unless they sign up to the website with their email or their SAP ID (like a P or S or C user ID). Which they certainly can do, because access is free, SAP just wants you to register to view the Info Center website.
So no, you can't shut off or redirect that tile (or any others in Manager, except turning them on/off via Permissions), but you can encourage your Learners to sign up to the Info Center if they want to, and learn more about SEN when they click the What's New tile. 
In my experience, Learners are generally not curious, and don't complain about tiles they don't use. And if you give them a link to the Learner View (https://[ManagerURL]/#learner ) and they bypass the Manager Home page anyway, they'll never use the tiles at all. They can access their Settings through the User Profile icon in the upper right corner of the screen. That's all they need.  And if you use a Learning Management System to track Learner training progress, and not the Manager, then Learners will never need to access the Manager interface at all, and the tiles in Manager are no longer relevant. 
@ShaneLipke or other people who are smarter than me, please add or correct me where needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP IQ 16.1 - Which tools can you recommend to track...
entry.content: Thanks Christian!

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: @Manoel can we change Qty OF Components or work centre in SAP DM & Send Back to SAP ERP Where it will Pick Production version of it & Accept changes & What status wll it put in SAP ERP & IN SAP DM if we change order in RMES Status

entry.title: Re: Proration and Number Formats in Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec 

it works! The issue was that I didn't run the bonus calculation after proration format change. 

In your video (3:56) you say that the step was not necessary and so probably it changed in the meantime and now it's a must.

Thank you a lot!

entry.title: Re: Prometheus Dashboard - How to monitor SAP IQ metrics using Prometheus
entry.content:
Hello, Roland!
Can you, please, provide updated link that you placed here
Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Context Help in SAP Enable Now Producer 2406
entry.content: Hello UlrG7 , when you publish the context.html file, you select which parameters it will use, such as TCODE. The process is shown in the SAP Enable Now Info Center website at https://enable-now.sap.com/ , under Product Integration > Context.html and SAP GUI. When you test the context.html in Producer after you generate it, it prompts you for the parameter to search for (such as Tcode). You enter the Tcode and click OK, and it returns the list of published documents that it found in SEN, exactly the way the SAP GUI Help menu will display it. If the piece of content you expect to see is not in that list, then either it does not contain the parameter you tested, or it is not published in SEN Manager.

entry.title: Re: Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Natalia,

There could be many reasons for this such as closed financial period or a wrongly configured billing profile. It’d probably be easier if we went through the system together. Therefore, I have scheduled a meeting with you.

Best regards,

Andreas

entry.title: Problems while upload many items from offline store
entry.content:
I have a problem when I try to upload many items from offline store on iPhone

I have an mdk application where I can create notifications.
It is possible that the user will create about 300 Notifications with Images before trying to upload them from offline store. The upload will take a long time and at the moment I have the problem that the upload is always aborted before it is finished:

  • When I keep the app in foreground and the Screen active (automatic lock inactive) this error appears after about 50-60 minutes. How can I avoid this error?
  • When I keep the app in foreground but the iPhone locks itselfe (automatic lock after 5 minutes) the upload aborts after about 20 Minutes saying that my session has expired. Is there a way to upload many items while the iPhone is locked?

I already increased the timeout on mobile services cf. Before this change the upload was aborted after 15 minutes. (now the timeout should be 6 hours)

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@tmeyer  hello, from what I found,

A,L,M -> output of replication flow.

U,I,D -> from manual changes to the table with table editor.

entry.title: Fiori & CAP: how can I prefill key field of draft-enabled entity?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm just working on a Fiori app with draft enabled CAP entity and listreport . If I press the standard "create" button, I like to prefill my only one existing key field of type integer and not of type UUID. Currently, a dialog popup over is asking for all key field values before entering the object page (which is standard edit flow).

In order to get a prefilled value of my key field before opening the dialog popover, I tried to hook into CAP service API srv.before("NEW",MyEntity.drafts, req => {...}) and within this req function I determine the next available key field value according to my own logic.
The problem here is that this hook will not be called before the dialog popover will be displayed.

Which approach should I use instead? Do I have to implement a custom action and try to hide the standard create action button? Is there maybe an example in GIT demonstrating the prefilling ?

Yours
Stephan

entry.title: Re: Call a released oData service from a RAP BO behavior...
entry.content: I found a workaround for this for odata v2, which is by using a local proxy instead. This is not Tier 1. The clean Tier 1 approach is using a service consumption model, however, it is only available for public cloud/BTP ABAP environment.

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi Ivangomez

 

The functionality that you are asking for is not available.

Let me explain how the system works and why it is a best practice to have one document payment per supplier:

When you run the Manage Automatic Payment App, the system creates a clearing document for each supplier. The payment media file is a batch of all the payment documents, and an item for each payment with the details of the supplier banks is created.

If you have activated BCM, the approvers can reject one payment of that batch, and the system can reverse that specific payment (clearing document).

And the other scenario is if your Bank rejects one payment of the batch, you can reverse that document and process again the corresponding invoice.

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: CAP with Fiori Elements: Side Effects, Custom Actions, Dynamic Expressions
entry.content: Great blog! Your explanation should be part of Fiori documentation.

entry.title: How to add EKKO-LOEKZ on Manage PO on Public Cloud

In the "Manage Purchase Orders" screen Public Cloud, we want to add the EKKO LOEKZ field to the filters to hide the orders where all items have been marked for deletion. However, we were unable to add it. How can we proceed on this matter?

 

Thanks for your help.

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Problems while upload many items with upload categories
entry.content:
This question is related to the Question https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problems-while-upload-many-items-from-offline-store/qaq-p/13962981#M4896178. But because I have different problems I decided to split it into two posts.

I am trying to upload many created notifications including images from offline store. With the standard upload action it is taking quite a lot of time and I have no progressbar or information about the current status (e.g. uploading notification 33/300)
So I tried to solve the problem by using upload categories and tried to split the huge amount of notifications into smaller pieces. With upload categories I managed that always 20 notifications will be uploaded at once, then the next 20. This approach is working good when the notifications do not have images. When they have images one strage problem occures. The upload time for 20 notifications increases exponential with the number of notifications in offline store. You can see it here in this diagram. Each Notification in the example has one image.

When I have 150 notifications in offline store and I try to upload the first 20, it takes about 23s/notification. When I have only 30 left it only takes 5s/notification.
For me it seams like he is trying to upload all images of all notifications each time although I only want to upload 20 notifications+images.
What could be the reason for that?
This problem only occurs when I am adding images to the notifications. When I am working with notifications without images everything is working fine.
But beside from this performance problem everything is fine. All notifications are created correctly in the backend with the correct images attached (always one notification with one image). So the link from the image to the notification seems to be correct.

Here is my code:

CreateNotification.action

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateEntity",
	"ActionResult": {
		"_Name": "CreateNotification"
	},
	"Target": {
		"Service": "/Mangelmeldung/Services/ex1.service",
		"EntitySet": "Notification_HeaderSet"
	},
	"Properties": {
		"NOTIF_NO": "{NOTIF_NO}",
		"DAMAGE": "{DAMAGE}",
		"DAMAGE_PIC": "{DAMAGE_PIC}",
		"DAMAGE_PICGRP": "{DAMAGE_PICGRP}",
		"ITEM_KEY": "{ITEM_KEY}",
		"CREATED_BY": "{CREATED_BY}",
		"NOTIFTIME": "{NOTIFTIME}",
		"NOTIF_DATE": "{NOTIF_DATE}",
		"OBJECT": "{OBJECT}",
		"OBJECT_CODE": "{OBJECT_CODE}",
		"OBJECT_CODEGRP": "{OBJECT_CODEGRP}",
		"PLTXT": "{PLTXT}",
		"TPLNR": "{TPLNR}",
		"EQUNR": "{EQUNR}",
		"EQKTX": "{EQKTX}",
		"SHORT_TEXT": "{SHORT_TEXT}",
		"LONG_TEXT": "{LONG_TEXT}",
		"MarkerDistanceEndPoint": "{MarkerDistanceEndPoint}",
		"MarkerDistanceStartPoint": "{MarkerDistanceStartPoint}",
		"MarkerDistanceUnit": "{MarkerDistanceUnit}",
		"MarkerEndPoint": "{MarkerEndPoint}",
		"MarkerStartPoint": "{MarkerStartPoint}",
		"DAMAGE_TXT": "{DAMAGE_TXT}",
		"ITEM_ID": "{ITEM_ID}",
		"REPORTEDBY": "{REPORTEDBY}"
	},
	"RequestOptions": {
		"RemoveCreatedEntityAfterUpload": true,
		"UploadCategory": "{NOTIF_NO}"
	},
	"Headers": {
		"Content-ID": "1"
  	}	
}

CreateNotificationChangeSet.action

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.ChangeSet",
	"ActionResult": {
		"_Name": "CreateNotificationChangeSet"
	},
	"OnFailure": {
		"Name": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/GenericMessageBox.action",
		"Properties": {
			"Message": "$(L,'Notification_CreateFailureMessage','{#ActionResults:CreateNotificationChangeSet/error}')",
			"Title": "$(L,'Notification_ErrorTitle')"
		}
	},
	"OnSuccess": "/Mangelmeldung/Rules/Service/notificationChangeSetCreated.js",
	"Target": {
		"Service": "/Mangelmeldung/Services/ex1.service"
	},
	"Actions": []
}

 CreateRelatedMediaOfflineDoc.action

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateRelatedMedia",
	"Target": {
		"Service": "/Mangelmeldung/Services/ex1.service",
		"EntitySet": "Offline_Notification_DocumentSet"
	},
	"Properties": {
		"NOTIF_KEY": "{NOTIF_NO}",
		"DOCUMENT_ID": "{DOCUMENT_ID}",
		"FILENAME": "{FILENAME}",
		"MIMETYPE": "{MIMETYPE}",
		"DATE": "{DATE}"
	},
	"ParentLink": {
		"Property": "HeaderToOfflineDocumentNav",
		"Target": {
			"EntitySet": "Notification_HeaderSet",
			"ReadLink": "{ReadLink}"
		}
	},
	"RequestOptions": {
		"RemoveCreatedEntityAfterUpload": true,
		"UploadCategory": "{NOTIF_NO}"
	},
	"Media": "{MEDIA}",
	"Headers": {
		"SLUG": "{FILENAME}"
	}
}

UploadStartedMessage.action

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.ProgressBanner",
	"OnSuccess": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/UploadChanges.action",
	"CompletionMessage": "$(L,'ProgressBanner_UploadCompleteMessage')",
	"Message": "will be overwritten",
	"CompletionTimeout": 5,
	"Animated": false
}

UploadChanges.action

{
    "Service": "/Mangelmeldung/Services/ex1.service",
    "_Type": "Action.Type.OfflineOData.Upload",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "upload"
    },
    "UploadCategories": "/Mangelmeldung/Rules/Service/getNextUploadCategories.js",
    "OnFailure": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/UploadFailureMessage.action"
}

getNextUploadCategories.js

export default async function getNextUploadCategories(clientAPI) {
    return clientAPI.getPageProxy().getActionBinding()?.uploadCategory;
}

executeChangeSetActions.js

export default async function executeChangeSetActions(clientAPI) {
    
    let attachmentData = convertAttachmentData(clientAPI);
    let bindingObject = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getActionBinding();

    // @TS-ignore
    let createResult = await clientAPI.executeAction({
        "Name": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/CreateNotification.action"
    });
    //Rückgabe des Anlegens für Read Link speichern
    let createResultData = JSON.parse(createResult["data"]);
    for(let i = 0; i < attachmentData.length; i++){
        bindingObject.DOCUMENT_ID = attachmentData[i].DOCUMENT_ID;
        bindingObject.FILENAME = attachmentData[i].FILENAME;
        bindingObject.MIMETYPE = attachmentData[i].MIMETYPE;
        bindingObject.DATE = attachmentData[i].DATE;
        bindingObject.ReadLink = createResultData["@odata.readLink"]
        bindingObject.MEDIA = attachmentData[i].MEDIA;

        // @TS-ignore
        await clientAPI.executeAction({
            "Name": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/CreateRelatedMediaOfflineDoc.action"
        });
    }
}

 relevant lines from createNotification.js 

        let bindingObject = {};
        clientAPI.getPageProxy().setActionBinding(bindingObject);
        bindingObject.NOTIF_NO      = newNotificationID;
        bindingObject.DAMAGE        = notificationData.damageCode.DAMAGE;
        bindingObject.DAMAGE_PIC    = notificationData.damageCode.DAMAGE_PIC;
        bindingObject.DAMAGE_PICGRP = notificationData.damageCode.DAMAGE_PICGRP;
        bindingObject.ITEM_KEY      = "0001";
        bindingObject.NOTIFTIME     = selectedTimeString;
        bindingObject.CREATED_BY    = userId;
        bindingObject.NOTIF_DATE    = selectedDateTimeString;
        bindingObject.OBJECT        = notificationData.objectPart.OBJECT;
        bindingObject.OBJECT_CODE   = notificationData.objectPart.OBJECT_CODE;
        bindingObject.OBJECT_CODEGRP= notificationData.objectPart.OBJECT_CODEGRP;
        bindingObject.PLTXT         = notificationData.technicalObject.PLTXT;
        bindingObject.TPLNR         = notificationData.technicalObject.TPLNR;
        bindingObject.EQUNR         = notificationData.technicalObject.EQUNR;
        bindingObject.EQKTX         = notificationData.technicalObject.EQKTX;
        bindingObject.SHORT_TEXT    = notificationData.description.value;
        bindingObject.LONG_TEXT     = notificationData.longText;
        bindingObject.DAMAGE_TXT    = "";
        bindingObject.ITEM_ID       = "";
        bindingObject.REPORTEDBY    = userId;

        //Check which actions do we need and if we have attachments
        if (appClientData.attachmentData && appClientData.attachmentData.length > 0){
            createActions.push("/Mangelmeldung/Rules/MainPage/executeChangeSetActions.js");
        }else{
            createActions.push("/Mangelmeldung/Actions/CreateNotification.action");
        }
        clientAPI.getLogger().log(`Create Notification Change Set: ${JSON.stringify(bindingObject)}`, 'Info');
        // @TS-ignore
        return clientAPI.executeAction({
            "Name": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/CreateNotificationChangeSet.action",
            "Properties": {
                "Actions": createActions
            }
        });

and my upload logic: 

var uploadCountTotal;
    var uploadCountCurrent = 0; 
    var uploadedNotifications = []; 
    console.time("uploadTime");
    var notifications = await getOutstandingNotifications(clientAPI, uploadedNotifications);
    try {
        while( notifications.length > 0) {
            const startPart = Date.now();
            uploadCountTotal = notifications.length + uploadCountCurrent;

            var notificationsToUpload = [];
            var concurrentUploads = numberOfConcurrentUploads(notifications.length);
            for(var i=0; i<concurrentUploads && i<notifications.length; ++i) {
                notificationsToUpload.push(notifications.getItem(i).NOTIF_NO);
            }
            uploadedNotifications = uploadedNotifications.concat(notificationsToUpload);
            clientAPI.getPageProxy().setActionBinding({uploadCategory: notificationsToUpload})
            // @TS-ignore
            await clientAPI.executeAction({"Name": "/Mangelmeldung/Actions/UploadStartedMessage.action",
                "Properties": {
                    "Message": `$(L,'ProgressBanner_UploadingMessage', ${uploadCountCurrent}, ${uploadCountTotal})`
                }
            });
            await closePageAndRefreshMain(clientAPI, true);
            uploadCountCurrent += notificationsToUpload.length;
            notifications = await getOutstandingNotifications(clientAPI, uploadedNotifications);

            const endPart = Date.now();
            alert(`PART: Uploaded ${notificationsToUpload.length} notifications in ${Math.round((endPart - startPart)/1000)}s. ${Math.round((endPart - startPart)/1000/notificationsToUpload.length)}s/notification.`);
    
        }
    }catch(e) {
    }


async function getOutstandingNotifications(clientAPI, uploadedNotifications) {
    var notifications = await clientAPI.read("/Mangelmeldung/Services/ex1.service", "Notification_HeaderSet", []);
    return notifications.filter(e => !uploadedNotifications.includes(e.NOTIF_NO));       
}

function numberOfConcurrentUploads(count) {
    if(count < 15)
        return 5;
    if(count < 30)
        return 10;
    else
        return 20;
}

entry.title: Building Block for Attachments not working in UI5
entry.content:
I'm trying to use the building block for file upload as described here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableUpload

The table is succesfully displayed and loaded. However, I get the some error messages in the console:
- Error on retrieving command shortcut. Command DeleteEntry was not found!
- TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'setProperty')
at Object.updateBindingInfo (TableDelegate.ts:763:26)
at tt._rebind
- The PageReady Event was not fired within the 7000 ms timeout . It has been forced. Please contact your application developer for further analysis

Has anybody already dealt with these kind of issues, every help is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
I had the exact same issue as @smx - based on his suggestion (thank you!), I redownloaded the DMG and then it worked fine. I am just updating this in case any one else has the same issue.

@RMW - Thank you for all your work. I feel like you are single-handedly supporting all of us corporate misfits who want to use a Mac 😁. I did find a couple of bugs though, with -- With Modal dialogs in MM02/MM03 and with System Colors not working with the Morning Horizon Theme. I will open support cases for both these issues.

entry.title: Re: Restrict changing quantity in inbound delivery whith...
entry.content:
Hi @Ilfan,

In the Delivery Item category level, there is a field Over Delivery, set this field to "B", this will thrown an error message will not let you enter more quantity.

SPRO --> Logistics Execution --> Shipping --> Deliveries --> Define Item categories.

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: error handling on process automation BPA with NO RPA
entry.content:
Hi 

I created a workflow with process autoamtion (no RPA involved and no licenses available)

when the wf call an API and the API respond with error 4XX there is no way the workflow goes to error and only an admin che restart or do anything.

Is there some workaround or some way to build a try and catch?

Please keep in mind that is not available any functionality of the rpa (script agent and so on)

Thanks and regards

 

Adriano

entry.title: Service Delivery for customers with 'EU access' SAP Cloud ALM tenants
entry.content:
In the context of service deliveries, a customer’s SAP Cloud ALM tenant communicates with applications inside SAP. This communication is bidirectional.

The applications inside SAP in this scenario are NOT restricted to EU access.

The data transfer from SAP into an SAP Cloud ALM customer tenant always happens the same way, independent of whether the customer tenant has 'EU access' restrictions or not. 
For the data transfer from the customer tenant to SAP, customers with EU access have to ensure that no personal data is transferred from the customer tenant to SAP. To achieve this, the following features are available in the customer tenant:

1. No structured personal data is sent from the customer tenant to SAP. That means that the following information is NOT sent to SAP:

  • the assignee for an issue or action - only the information that an issue or action is assigned is sent to SAP.
  • the author of a comment for preparation tasks - the comment itself is sent, but not the author of the comment.
  • the creator of an attachment
  • the author of a note

2. There are some non-structured text fields for which the content is sent from the customer tenant to SAP. For these text fields, there is NO cross-check whether personal data is entered before replicating the data back to SAP. All information entered in such text fields is replicated. Customers must ensure that no personal data is entered in such text fields. To help with this, all relevant text fields have been extended to include a warning that personal data should not be included.

 

 

 

 

 


Customers with EU access tenants should train their end users in the correct maintenance of such text fields.

Keep in mind that some text fields, for instance the comments for issues and actions, are only persisted on the customer tenant and are not sent to SAP at all.

3. Attachments uploaded in a service delivery context on a customer's SAP Cloud ALM tenant are typically replicated back to SAP. There is NO cross-check whether the attachment contains personal data. Customers must ensure that no personal data is included in such attachments. To help with this, the upload of attachments has been enhanced with a warning to ensure that no personal data is included in the document to be uploaded.

Customers with EU access tenants should train their end users in ensuring that uploaded documents do not contain any personal data.

All these features are available for all SAP Cloud ALM customer tenants – with and without restricted EU access.

For further details regarding the data transfer between SAP and a SAP Cloud ALM customer tenant, please see the respective Blog or check out SAP Note 3401303.

entry.title: Re: Idt/error : Failed to calculate tax
entry.content: Hi Rameshgandi, have you found the solution of this issue?

entry.title: Is there an option to default position title from job title field in Create New Position?
entry.content:
Is there an option to default "position title" from "job title" field in Create Same Level Position option through Position Org Chart?

We need to enter the position title manually in the screen so looking for option if the field can be pre-populated with job title value.

entry.title: Step by Step guide to creating remote data in HDI - Fabric Virtual Table details
entry.content:
Topic discussed here:

  1.  Adding ALTER RIGHTS into the HDI container
  2.  BUILD and ALTER SNAPSHOT to REFRESH
  3.  Adding procedure for the ALTER SNAPSHOT
  4. Adding scheduler job to run the procedure

Prerequisites:

This content is the based on :

Step by Step guide to creating remote data in HDI 

Content from this blog is used in this blog.

1. Adding ALTER RIGHTS into the HDI container

The HDI had always been very reluctant to give more rights into HDI containers. Now with FabricVirtualTable we have the need to change the "mode" of the table "on the fly". Means that the application should do changes on runtime. 

As you have see above you need to ALTER VIRTUAL TABLE but you do not have alter rights in HDI by default.

In the file structure please add /db/defaults folders a file default_access_role.hdbrole

This will overwrite the default we have in HDI contatiners that is implicitly given.

The difference to the default is the "ALTER"

 

 

 

 

 

{
  "role": {
    "name": "default_access_role",
    "schema_privileges": [
      {
        "privileges": [
          "DELETE",
          "CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE",
          "EXECUTE",
          "INSERT",
          "SELECT",
          "SELECT CDS METADATA",
          "UPDATE",
          "ALTER"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

 

 

 

 

 

2. BUILD and ALTER SNAPSHOT to REFRESH

from an exsiting table CUSTOMER, a snapshot subset as VT_CUSTOMER will be build:

For our source side we now need another table called CUSTOMER:

SOURCE DATABASE (MYAPPLICATION)

 

 

 

DO BEGIN
    DECLARE DROP INT;
    select count(*) into DROP from tables where table_name = 'CUSTOMER';
    If DROP > 0 then
        DROP TABLE CUSTOMER;
    END IF;
END;

CREATE COLUMN TABLE CUSTOMER (
    ID INTEGER, 
    FIRST_NAME  NVARCHAR(100), 
    MIDDLE_NAME NVARCHAR(100),
    LAST_NAME   NVARCHAR(100),
    TELEPHONE   NVARCHAR(22),
    CELLPHONE   NVARCHAR(22),
    ACTIVE      BOOLEAN

    );

 

 

 

and fill the table with some data:

 

 

 

INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(1, 'Albert','F','Einstein',1234,1234,TRUE);
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(2, 'Robert','F','Oppenheimer',1234,1234,TRUE);
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(3, 'Marie','F','Currie',1234,1234,TRUE);
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(4, 'Enrico','F','Fermi',1234,1234,TRUE);
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(5, 'Guglielmo','F','Marconi',1234,1234,TRUE);
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(6, 'Karl','Ferdinand','Braun',1234,1234,TRUE);

 

 

 

For this table we need now on the target side  the virtual table:

HDI Target: VT_CUSTOMER.hdbvirtualtable (open in Textmode):

 

 

 

VIRTUAL TABLE "VT_CUSTOMER" 
    (
    ID          INTEGER, 
    FIRST_NAME  NVARCHAR(100), 
    LAST_NAME   NVARCHAR(100),
    CELLPHONE   NVARCHAR(22)
    )
AT "HC_REMOTESOURCE"."<NULL>"."MYAPPLICATION"."CUSTOMER";

 

 

 

Notice that this is a SUBSET of the original source CUSTOMER. Valid for SNAPSHOT and REPLICA

Now deploy this again and you should see this on the target side:

 

Now we add another Nobel prize winner on the SOURCE side:

 

 

 

INSERT INTO CUSTOMER values(6, 'Johannes','Diderik','van der Waals',1234,1234,TRUE);

 

 

 

Now if we retrieve again the VT_CUSTOMER nothing will change and we do not see Mr. "van der Waals". This is a SNAPSHOT and only shows new values after a "REFRESH"

 

 

 

ALTER VIRTUAL TABLE VT_CUSTOMER REFRESH SNAPSHOT REPLICA;

 

 

 

This ALTER should work now since we have the rights we made in step 1

Technical ALL the data of table CUSTOMER are refetched now into VT_CUSTOMER again ( including the missing Mr. van der Waals. By copy/paste Mr van der Waals got the same ID. 😞

So now we have a SUBSET of SNAPSHOT of CUSTOMER in VT_CUSTOMER. And we overcome the ALTER problem as well.

3. Adding a Procedure for the ALTER SNAPSHOT

Choosing a procedure is simple: It can be scheduled by a scheduler job process. So here we go:

We are using here a trick with the EXEC. There is an issue with unsupported syntax which should be fixed soon. This is a workaround:

 

PROCEDURE SNAPSHOT_REFRESHING_PROC ()
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT SQL SECURITY INVOKER AS

BEGIN 
    EXEC 'ALTER VIRTUAL TABLE VT_CUSTOMER REFRESH SNAPSHOT REPLICA';
    --ALTER VIRTUAL TABLE VT_CUSTOMER REFRESH SNAPSHOT REPLICA
END

 

 

4. Adding scheduler job to run the procedure

Now we want the refresh to happen regular. In HDI we have a scheduler job that will do this for us on a regular basis.

 

SCHEDULER JOB SNAPSHOT_REFRESHING_JOB
CRON '* * * * * */4 0' ENABLE PROCEDURE SNAPSHOT_REFRESHING_PROC;

 

This will give you every 4 minutes a refresh of your snapshot. 

Be sure what you do here!

This will creating cost as network egress and CPU usage on a constant basis. 

You will get a more or less up to date source table. 

Hope this works for you as easy as it does for me. Enjoy and season greetings.

entry.title: Standard fields in acedoca table missing in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In on prem system, we have below fields in acdoca table. But in public cloud, I see below fields are not available. Any idea how can we extend these standard fields in acdoca in public cloud.

kvgr1 (Customer Group 1)

kvgr2(Customer Group 2)
kvgr3(Customer Group 3)

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Vienna 2025 - registration is now open!
entry.content:
!!! The venue has limited capacity. A free Eventbrite ticket is mandatory for attendance. Get your ticket here !!!

This is the official SAP Community event for the SAP Inside Track Vienna 2025. Please note that attendence is only possible with a valid ticket from Eventbrite, get it here.


Hello World 👋
The registration for SAP Inside Track Vienna 2025 is now open.
Grab your official free ticket on Eventbrite here.
Also make sure to visit our homepage at sit.wien.
We are excited to deliver you a friday full of networking opportunities and insightful talks with your fellow SAP technicians, consultants and users.

When?
Friday, 21.03.2025
from 09:00 to 18:00

Where?
SCC EDV-Beratung AG
Mantlergasse 30-32
1130 Vienna
Austria

Interested in becoming a sponsor?
Please see our sponsoring options here.

Interested in sharing your wisdom with the community?
Consider attending as a speaker - submit your session here.


See you there!
- SITVIE Team

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web services and passing binary data to them
entry.content: I'm no HTTP expert, but I guess the Content-Disposition in your sample is NOT part of the HTTP header but the HTTP body (as there's the empty line above that follows the HTTP header), so you might just have to add it to the body you provide?

entry.title: Re: Call a released oData service from a RAP BO behavior...
entry.content: Hi Rammel. I got a bit lost here. If you are not working on S/4 HANA Cloud Public neither BTP, then that means are free to read information using SELECT to a database or even using BAPIs. Why you need an Odata Service?

entry.title: The Art and Science of CAP (part 6) with Daniel Hutzel (Holiday Season edition)
entry.content:
Daniel Hutzel continues on his exploration of The Art and Science of CAP, sharing insights and ideas from the origins, philosophy and magic of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. #SAPCAP #TASC

See the blog post The Art and Science of CAP for all details, notes, previous episodes, links and more.

entry.title: Introducing RedRays AI-Based ABAP Code Analyzer – Beta Release
entry.content:
For the past few months, our team has been working tirelessly on a solution that can proactively help ABAP developers identify security and quality issues right at the code level. Today, we’re excited to announce a beta release of our AI-based ABAP code analyzer, available at ai.redrays.io for a limited two-week testing period.

Why This Matters:

Complex ABAP applications often evolve quickly, and manual code reviews can be time-consuming and prone to oversight. Vulnerabilities and code quality issues not only slow down development cycles but can also open the door to security risks, performance degradation, and maintenance challenges. Our analyzer aims to tackle these audit-related problems head-on by providing immediate insights into potential weaknesses.

Key Capabilities:

  • Instant Feedback on Vulnerabilities: Input your ABAP code, and within seconds our AI will highlight potential issues—such as possible SQL injections, cross-site scripting (XSS) risks, data flow leaks, and other threats—that could pose real risks to your system.

  • No Data Retention: We respect your privacy. Our beta does not use a database; we do not store your code or results anywhere. Once you close the page, your results are gone. This ensures a secure, no-trace testing environment.

  • Two-Week Open Beta: This limited testing window is your chance to explore the tool, understand its capabilities, and share your feedback. Whether you’re concerned about compliance checks, internal audits, or simply want to improve code quality, your input will help us refine accuracy, enhance the user experience, and expand the range of detected issues.

Get Started Now:

  1. Visit ai.redrays.io.
  2. Paste your ABAP code.
  3. Review the generated report of potential vulnerabilities and quality concerns.
  4. Close the page, and rest assured—your data leaves with you.

Next Steps:

We’re eager to evolve this tool based on community feedback. Tell us what’s working, what’s confusing, and which features would make the analyzer more valuable in your day-to-day operations. Together, we can make ABAP code scanning simpler, faster, and more effective, ultimately enhancing the security and reliability of SAP environments.

Try it out now: ai.redrays.io

We look forward to hearing your thoughts!

entry.title: Re: Direct link to a SAP Enable Now Glossary
entry.content:
Hi  @ShaneLipke , I now have the same issue (not sure it's related to the 2411 Cloud SEN upgrade or not). We are using the Playback Settings > Library > Glossary > Glossary Group to make the Glossary menu display in the Library's upper left drop-down menu button.

As such, it was always my understanding that using the Glossary setting in the Playback Settings precludes any direct Library View of the Glossary, because that Playback setting suppresses the Glossary folders and their contents from displaying in the Library tree. We've had it set that way for a year or two, and we always tell the Learners to use the Library's upper left drop-down menu button to see the Glossary. A teammate told me today that there was a direct hyperlink set up to the Glossary that USED to work, and the Glossary would display its folders AND the contents, but now it no longer works. I tested and confirmed that it does not work now, because the Glossary folders are empty in the Library tree.

I don't remember it ever working with a direct link. I performed the steps you outlined here to make it work, but those steps do not work for me. The Library and its Text Units are all Published, the Text Units are "Glossary" type, we are using the Description field for the definition.

Old link in a Book Page to the Glossary folder, which no longer works (if it ever did, I never saw it work), is a Workspace link to the Glossary folder [no URL is displayed]


New link using your steps, which does not work either:
Free Link to the Glossary folder, https://[ManagerURL]/wa/[workareaID]/~tag/published/index.html?show=group!GR_5119BFC72F69B386


Any suggestions?

entry.title: SAP BN4L-GTT: How to manage new updates in your SAP S/4 HANA ABAP Back End code from GTT
entry.content:
The purpose of this article is to highlight to Consultants and Customers who are implementing SAP Business Network for Logistics – Global Track and Trace (SAP BN4L-GTT) the importance of keep the eyes in new updates in SAP S/4 HANA Back-End ABAP code.

SAP Business Network for Logistics – Global Track and Trace is a Cloud solution that receives monthly updates from SAP. These updates happens in the system’s Front-End and in Back-End (environment that contains the SAP S/4 HANA ABAP code and data extraction programs).

The Front-End updates are delivered automatically by SAP, but the Back-End environment updates are not, and sporadic manual interventions by the IT Customer Department Teams (N1 and N2 teams for functional application support) will be required.

How can I identify whether it will be necessary to perform an update on the system’s Back-End?

You will need to log in to the SAP Roadmap Explorer page: roadmaps.sap.com Click on “Products” and select “Business Network for Logistics”

It will be possible to view deliveries of past and future releases of the solution by clicking on “Global Track and Trace”

Q stands for Quarter, a 3-months interval in which SAP will make 3 versions of the application available.

Q1: Versions for the months of January, February and March
Q2: Versions for the months of April, May and June
Q3: Versions for the months of July, August and September
Q4: Versions for the months of October, November and December

Delivered             : This means that the functionality has been delivered.
Future Release    : This means that the functionality will be delivered in a future version of GTT.

However, some SAP BN4L-GTT features require manual intervention to be used.

At the time of publication of this document, it is necessary to check the functionality in detail by clicking on its title in SAP Road Map Explorer and reading the “Features” section. 
Example: In Q1 2023, the functionality below was available:

Accessing the “Features” section, you can identify that to use this feature, you need to download the updated Sample ABAP code in the SAP BN4L-GTT directory, hosted on the GitHub.com website.

The next step would be to assign this activity to an SAP ABAP Specialist, with the SAP S/4 HANA developer profile.

This activity should be performed by the SAP ABAP Specialist, but under the supervision of a SAP BN4L-GTT Functional Specialist, who is familiar with the solution, to guide him/her through the process.

The step-by-step guide on how to perform this update can be found in the document below: Sample Code Configuration Guide for Integration with SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, in the Download ABAP CODE from GITHUB chapter.

How do I identify that the source code update was successful?

At the end of the execution, the following message should appear on the screen: Repository *** **** successfuly pulled for package ********.

Recommendation:

Since this is an important activity with a major impact on the system, if any undesirable side effects occur during or after updating the ABAP source code, during testing (for sure, first in your DEV  system) and troubleshooting measures by your SAP BN4L-GTT Functional Specialist are ineffective, SAP should be involved by sending an email to the current contact on the Project or by opening an Incident.

It is recommended that monthly checks be carried out on the SAP Roadmap Explorer website: roadmaps.sap.com, as this is the frequency of new features made available by SAP in SAP BN4L-GTT.

This way, you will always keep your system updated and take advantage of the new features and improvements offered in the solution.

I hope this information could help you! 🙂 
If you enjoyed this article, please like it, share it, spread the knowledge.
Thanks!

* This article was not written with artificial intelligence*

Information is not knowledge. The only source of knowledge is experience. You need experience to gain wisdom. (Albert Einstein)

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 1.0 data migration
entry.content: We are looking for some guidance with data migration as well. We don't want to add any MDF objects for accessing old data, what other options do we have to back up documents from ONB 1.0??

Hi Guru's,

I'm Getting this error while converting PR to PO, I have not completely configured flexible workflow for PR but still getting this error.

entry.title: Standard email template for Sales Quotations
entry.content:
Hi,

We've seen that there is a standard email template for Sales Orders in the 'Maintain Email Templates' app: SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE. However, we need a standard template to use for Sales Quotations, is there a standard one available for quotations as well?

Kind regards.

 

 

Is there a standard email template for sales quotations?
If not, is there a way for me to add one and use it?

 

Best PERSON_NAME,
Jieun Lee


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Standard email template for Sales Quotations
entry.content:
Hello,

The standard email template 'Sales Document Default Email Template' (SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE) is a email template for all types of Sales Documents, not only Sales Orders. Therefore you can use this same one for Sales Quotations, or you can copy it and customize you own template.

Please check more information here: Extensibility for Output Forms and Email Templates of Sales Documents - Email Templates | SAP Help Portal

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Province Field Blank in Canadian Compliance Forms
entry.content: Thanks Frans for sharing. So all Province values are contained in one MDF?

Elisabetta

entry.title: How to find input values for a BAPI. Can BAPI tcode be used.
entry.content:
Tried to create ECN with BAPI - BAPI_ECN_CREATE. However, this can be used to upload only the object types and not the objects.

Tried this header structure but its not updating it.

Is there any other BAPI to create the ECN with objects. Can BAPI tcode show the inputs and output for a BAPI

entry.title: Re: Call a released oData service from a RAP BO behavior...
entry.content: Hi @DiegoValdivia, the goal is to try to use "released objects/APIs" as much as possible to be upgrade safe. In this scenario, if ever there is a data that we need to access and for that data there is no released CDS view/RAP BO, we are trying to check whether we can call a released remote API/odata instead of reading the data directly from a standard database table or using unreleased BAPIs which is not considered Tier 1. However, after doing this POC, I noticed that even using the local odata proxy is not Tier 1 since the class to instantiate the local proxy is also unreleased. So we may need to change our strategy and create a custom CDS view/class for extracting the data and release it to cloud (Tier 2) so that we can access it from Tier 1 objects.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Scripting Security parameters
entry.content: Link for documentation with full details: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/1f190e2f59db43e192cba638ea29870b/68e329a92e4b454ba74cb196b614bc0a.html

entry.title: Re: Adobe Document Services on SLES 15 SP6 non latin char...
entry.content: Confirmed on this. SAP Replied to same to my incident with the note. I applied it and it resolved the issue.

entry.title: Re: How can I maintain decimals in calculating Frequency...
entry.content:
Thanks so much Andre and Nayamath,

This is the scenario:

The system does not calculate accurately monthly contract values with start and end dates within the months. Even after specifying various frequency options.
For example, a contract has a lease running for 01.08.2024 to 08.11.2024 as start and end date.
The duration is 3.27 months (as calculated on calculator)  and should give a Lease value of US$9,156.00 and HKL US$1,193.55 for the period.
Rather, the system is given US$9,146.67.48 and US$1,92.33 for both Lease and HKL. The Business were using AX to calculate and their developer gave them the functionality of decimals in frequency calculation. They want the same on SAP and I told them that there is no functionality as such for frequency on SAP. if you look closely, you will discover that the difference between the expected figure and the SAP figure is about $10. Kindly give me advise on SAP best practice. 

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: How the ECN will be created in Teamcenter and moved t...
entry.content: Step 4 - Glue to hold all information means we need to create BAPI programs in SAP to unpack the Teamcenter data and upload the BOM and ECN? What kind of file will be outputted XML?

entry.title: Can Serena business management and Teamcenter integrated to SAP
entry.content:
Business uses Serena Business Management (SBM) to create Engineering change numbers. Later it's manually updated to SAP via CC01. Also, this ECN is used to create BOM and material changes in Teamcenter. But here ECN is not maintained against material but in the diagrams. 
Now I would like to know can the ECN from SBM be moved to Teamcenter as a value against the material or not. Or is it possible to create changes in Teamcenter against the ECN?

Please give your guidance if any.

entry.title: Cash Management: Liquidity Item Derivation in MIRO Transaction
entry.content:
Dear All,

In Cash and Liquidity Management, we derive the liquidity item for Purchase Orders using Queries (Origin X). The same liquidity items are applicable for Goods Receipts (MIGO) transactions as well.

In the MIRO transaction, we will have two line items (GR/IR Dr and Vendor Cr). We can get the liquidity item for the vendor line item using Queris (Origin C).

Request your assistance for helping me understand how the system will derive the liquidity item for the GR/IR account.

Thanks & Regards

Surya

entry.title: Re: How to find input values for a BAPI. Can BAPI tcode be used.
entry.content: Checking SE37 for the BAPI in question along with the associated documentation is where I would start.

Thank you !

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Customer Projects Migration - Part 1: Migration of Fixed Price Projects (ongoing and partially b
entry.content: Very nice information. Some formatting would really help to make the blog more readable. I guess the transfer of the document to the new SAP Community causes the issues that formatting was removed. Also some information is outdated esp. those regarding data migration object names, and the app to use here. You use app "Migrate your data" and not "Manage your solution" anymore and the screenshots show the retired LTMC where-as since Cliud release 2008 the new SAP S/4HANA migration Cockpit "Migrate your data" app is being used. I guess an investment of 1 or 2 hours is needed to bring to update that blog. But it would be a good investement.

entry.title: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The third-party application is sending data to SAP Standard RFC BAPI parameter, then the BAPI will prepare a data then extract it / send it to third party application

My question is how to view the RFC BAPI received data and sent to third party application without any code modification? is there a log history of data received/sent in SAP or tcode I can use to view the received/sent data?


Like for example: these BAPI parameters was sent to third party application yesterday after a week I want to review/check the data sent to third party application

entry.title: Re: Call a released oData service from a RAP BO behavior definition
entry.content:
You are better off creating a wrapper for a BAPI and releasing it till a released alternative is available

Explaining Extensibility Model Best Practices

entry.title: How to fix the Material stock (company code xxxx) must be booked out in last two MM periods error
entry.content:
Hola, SAP Community!

Today, I will explore the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition world and provide some handy tips and information about the Reset Transactional Data Job. Let's get started!

  • This blog is based on the SAP Note 3363936, Case 1: "Same quantity in the two periods."
  • This job can be labor-intensive since it requires individual handling for each material.
  • This procedure is not valid on production systems. For more details, please read the blog What is the "Reset Transaction Data" Functionality... And when/how to use it...

While implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you may need to run the Reset Transaction Data job in the Schedule Accounting Data Changes app for various reasons.

When running this job, you may encounter the following error: FINS_ML_START013 Material stock (company code xxxx) must be booked out in last two MM periods.

This error is caused by the company code's stock of materials not being zero for the last two periods (the previous and current periods).

 

Follow the steps below to fix this error:

Step 1: Validate Open Period for Materials

Open the Close Periods app. Input the company code, period, and fiscal year. Then select "Check period only."

The next screen will display the chosen company code's current open period (122024 = December 2024).

Step 2: Review the Inventory Balance

Open the Material Inventory Values—Balance Summary app. In the scenario below you can see the balance for the previous and current periods are greater than zero.

December 2024(current period) with 2,996 PCs.

November 2024 (previous period) with the same values.

Step 3: Check the Status of the Inventory Quantity

Only materials with Unrestricted Use Stock status can be booked. If you have stock with another stock status, you must first set those values to zero.

For this example, I reversed the blocked materials document.

The quantity of the materials is updated.

The values are then automatically updated in the inventory balance.

December 2024 had 1,996 PCs.

November 2024 had the exact quantities and values.

Step 4: Book the Material Stock

Open the Post Goods Movement (MIGO) app and generate a "Post goods issue" with movement type 562 for quantity 1,996 PCs using a posting date of the previous period.

Step 5: Confirm the Inventory Balance is Zero

Return to Material Inventory Values – Balance Summary app and validate that the balance for both periods (last and previous) is zero.

Step 6: Run the Reset Transaction Data Job

Create a Reset Transaction Data job in the Schedule Accounting Data Changes app and add the values for the corresponding company code.

Once successfully executed, the application will display a log of deleted records, which can be downloaded in PDF format.

Following these steps, you can effectively execute the Reset Transactional Data Job in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

  • Find more book stock scenarios in the SAP Note 3363936 - How to clear stocks in current period and previous period.
  • SAP Note 3084794 - Reset Transactional Data - Error message "Material stock (company code xxxx) must be booke...
  • SAP Help Portal Reset Transaction Data. 
  • When you need to execute the Reset Transaction Data Job SAP Blog What is the "Reset Transaction Data" Functionality... And when/how to use it...

 

If you find this information helpful, please remember to give a kudo.

Stay tuned for more tips and insights!

entry.title: Re: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content: Hopefully there's no log, that would be too big to have everything traced. But you may activate an RFC trace when you want to analyze a problem. Otherwise, you must develop something based on a precise requirement (what do you really want to know, do you want to implement authorization checks, etc.), be careful about the data volume.

entry.title: Hi there, we want to create a business case by adding questions to managers to reply to promo
entry.content:
We aim to create a business case within the Job Info portlet by adding specific questions for managers to answer when submitting promotions. The questions to be included are:

  1. Please provide an overview of the associate's knowledge, skills, and experience as they relate to the new position.
  2. How was the proposed salary determined? (e.g., salary band, market data, internal equity considerations).
  3. Is this position considered a critical role?
  4. Where does this position fit within your succession plan?
  5. What impact will the promotion have on the department and/or similar positions within the department?
  6. Are there any additional Total Rewards changes requested with this promotion? (e.g., time off/vacation, bonus payments, additional compensation, education assistance, etc.).

Although we have already added the questions in the Job Info portlet, we are facing two issues:

  1. We need to create a separate section specifically for these questions.
  2. In the workflow, the questions are not appearing in the correct order, and sometimes not all of them are showing.

We need to ensure the questions are grouped into a separate section within the Job Info portlet and that they appear in the correct order in the workflow.

Please advise.

entry.title: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Looking for a way to consume custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-Premise in BTP ABAP Environment using Event Consumption Model.

1. Creating custom RAP events

2. Event consumption model for standard S/4HANA events using AsyncAPI on BTP ABAP environment - Step 4 onwards. AsyncAPI/Event metadata for released events can be downloaded from api.sap.com

My question is how can I generate the event metadata/AsyncAPI file for custom RAP events in S/4HANA Private Cloud to be able to use the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. I know it is possible to generate the event metadata for RAP events in S/4HANA Public Cloud - Steps 1 to 3, but is this possible on Private cloud. If not how can we consume custom RAP events from private cloud in SAP BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Creating and triggering non-RAP custom events from S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create and trigger non-RAP custom enterprise events from S/4HANA Private Cloud preferably through ABAP? If so, how can it be achieved and can we generate an event metadata/AsyncAPI file for such custom events for use in Event Consumption Model on BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Is it possible to search a dynamic attribute as a criteria in Advanced Search in BackOffice?
entry.content:
I'd like to search by a dynamic attribute in Advanced Search. I see it's mentioned here https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-q-a/how-to-use-a-dynamic-attribute-as-a-criteria-on-advanced-search-widget/qaq-p/11989583 that dynamic attribute cannot be searched by flexible search and "Solr support is on our roadmap and will replace the flexible search as the default search strategy." This was 9 years ago. 

Is it possible to do it now?

entry.title: BSP click on line in the loop get show a figure.jpg
entry.content:
Hello!

Could you help me?
I have an ABAP BSP with a loop of an internal table.
I need to have the option with a 'click' to choose a row or cell that allows to display a figure that is in a link.                                   Thank you!

Exemple:

entry.title: Error F5605 in trx F-28
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting Error F5605 (Specify account for the difference posting) for company code B but not in company code A.

I checked the following path and it is empty for both Company Codes. No reason codes created:

Financial Accounting (New)–> Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable–> Business Transactions–> Incoming Payments Incoming Payments Global Settings–> Overpayment/Underpayment–> Define Reason Codes (transaction OBBE).

I also checked trx FBKP (Automatic posting > Cash discount and payment differences > Payment differences by reason (ZDI)) and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is completed. This is at chat of accounts level.

I also checked trx OBXI for Cash discount expenses and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is complete. This is at chat of accounts level.

Thanks in advance for any help!!!

F

entry.title: Re: Document attachment provision in SAP S4 HANA public c...
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @Yogita_Kadam .

SAP offers DMS as an add-on to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. You can find the details on entitlements and extensions here. 

Please note, as an alternative to SAP DMS other document management services may be connected via CMIS. Please find respective information here.

If this addresses your question to your satisfaction, please do me a favor and confirm this response as a solution. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to add new attachment to existing equipment new mass
entry.content: Hi @T_Yaswanath_, Good responses require good context. Please provide some more detail about your use case and respective business requirements. Is the document to be attached the exact same one for all equipment? Or is the actual requirement that some data about the equipment gets printed with each maintenance order? Which data? Who will be doing what with the printed document? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: OPEN SQL - use of subquery to get max date
entry.content: This select can rturn more rows if you have two rows with same begda. So it is not a universal workaround of the missing select max( .... )

entry.title: Re: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @Hans_van_Essen ,

the system's capabilities supporting aspects of numbering requirements like you mentioned can be found in the SAP Help, here.  

If this answers your request please mark the response as solution accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: AMDP CDS View consuming a CDS view returning error due to a non-existent record present in the DB
entry.content:
Hi All,

An AMDP CDS view(Final View) consuming another CDS view(Intermediate/Source View) is returning the below error based out of a record that does not exist in the Intermediate/Source CDS View. However, the error causing record does exist in the underlying database which does not satisfy the conditions in the Intermediate/Source CDS view and consequently not present in the later. 

Database returned the SQL code 303. Error text:
invalid DATE, TIME or TIMESTAMP value: SQL Error#

Some more context.

The source database has 2 records including an incorrect date value - 6/31/2024 and another proper record

The intermediate view ignores the invalid record and shows only one record that is valid.

The final AMDP view is throwing error eventhough this record is non-existent in the intermediate view.

The error goes away if an additional condition to avoid this record is implmented in the intermediate view eventhough the number of records in this view remains the same with or without this condition.

Any suggestions or insights?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP PI REST-Sender Adapter Custom Error Handling Expression (Glob) SP28 - limited function?
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm implementing a REST to ABAP Proxy scenario on PI 7.5 single stack.

The GET operation of my service provides the customer id in the uri. The backend returns the customer data. In case of providing a non existing customer to the backend, the consumer would expect a http 404 not found. As backend ABAP Proxy can either send back an empty message or a http 500 (raise exception) i implemented a fault message type which is filled with some information about the error when raising the exception.
With this information the idea is to steer the http status code in error handling of the rest adapter with use of JSON Expression by reading a specific field in the payload.
The error payload look like this:


The expectation is, that i can read the value in element "status". If the payload value fits to the value in Expression(Glob) field, the adapter should trow http404


But unfortunately this is not working. The http status is not changed, it's still 500.
The only setup where i have a result is following:


Then i get a http 404:

Does anybody know, what I can use in the field Expression (Glob) in the error handling?

I tried *04, ?04, "404", nothing worked and after googling, chatgpting and reading a bunch of blogs i'm out of ideas.
Does anybody have sort of?
Thanks a lot
florgodi

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi @ivangomez ,

my colleague Edna has answered some aspects of your request. I'd like to ask though, is there a business reason why you cannot take advantage of the "payment proposal" feature of the application? According to SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library, proposals would allow you to investigate a "draft" of the payment run before it creates actual payment media. SAP considers this review of proposals one of the best practices preventing "damage" and the need for reversals down the road.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: General Release of SAP Analytics Cloud compass
entry.content: 🙌 @ChenNee

entry.title: Reforma tributária Brasil - Atualizações ERP
entry.content:
Boa tarde, Pessoal.

Gostaria  de uma ajuda , sou novo por aqui, já existem alguns fóruns específicos, que estejam fazendo estudos sobre as mudanças de processos e sistema ERP para atender a reforma tributária na SAP?

Como faço para ser incluído neste fóruns?

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
As a workaround, I managed to call the odata v2 service using a local proxy instead.

However, for odata v4, I am still getting the same error as before.

entry.title: Re: what is Fieldglass Tenant Truststore?
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your response

entry.title: Re: Basic Credit Management (BD6): Exlcude a payment term (prepayments) from credit limit calculatio
entry.content: Hi @Simon, aren't prepayments already automatically excluded from automated credit checks? AFAIK, only payment conditions which actually require credit are subject to checks. Did you have a different experience? Please let us know. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content:
Since this will be a very useful prompt for multiple reports, I suggest coding it within the universe.

I am going to assume you are using Information Design Tool (IDT) for your universe development.  If you are still using Universe Design Tool (UDT), you create an object with a prompt and logic that uses the system date if the prompt if empty.  Let me know if more details are needed here.

In IDT, go to Parameters and Lists of Values.  Create a parameter, type in the desired prompt text, set it to a date data type, under Set default values, select a formula and type in the SQL to provide the system date in your database.  If you happen to have a calendar table that contains all valid dates, set that as the Associated List of Values but this is not required.

In your reports, set a condition where the desired date object = this new parameter.  It will prompt you for a date and default to the system date.

entry.title: Re: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you&quot
entry.content: Affected me as well, that is annoying. You can turn off being tagged globally

entry.title: Upcoming change in Master Template usage activation for PDI User ByD
entry.content:
As you might be aware that with the release 2411 we introduced some changes in the form template upload functionalities

 

The change was as follows

all active buttons which would trigger a background job or change on the forms itself are inactive in the UI for PDI Development users.

All Standard Business User without those authorizations can use the functionality as before fully.

Based on Customer feedback we saw that if a PDI-Development User uploaded a form via SDK and then want to activate the form Template usage via

WOC:Application and User 

View: Master Templates

click on action 

Change Master template usage the "Use Master Template" activation box is inactive.

we will allow only this functionality via HF Collection 3 for PDI Development User and the deployment plan is the weekend 18-19 January 2025

 

Until the deployment, activation should be done as a Standard Business User

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
I'm just the outward face, but the work is done by very dedicated and experienced colleagues in the background. The credit goes to them.

Regarding system colors, please try according to 
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_java/e665f2b67dbd4328ab6bd9e029b84581/240814a7ec774eeca7fbd4254f2a0927.html , section "System Colors" or try out rev 1 once it is available, there it is more intuitive.
For the modal dialogs, please raise a support case.

entry.title: SAP Build is ignoring the annotations of the CDS view
entry.content:
I have a custom CDS view in S/4 with UI annotations. In SAP Build Code, I tried creating a list page as a SAP Fiori application, and a Full-Stack application. In both cases the application ignores the UI annotations.

I have access to another subaccount that does not have SAP Build, and there I can create a list page that does not ignore the UI annotations of the CDS view.

Is this an issue with SAP Build Code, or is there some action I need to undertake or a setting to adjust?

entry.title: why changes made to IDOC_DATA in exit_sapliedp_001 is not retained?
entry.content:
In  the IDOC type REMADV inside the customer exit- exit_sapliedp_001, I am making some changes to the value of a segment but when the IDOC is posted those values are not retained in the IDOC_DATA[ ] which is provided as a tables parameter. Can anyone help.

 

Thanks,

Prasenjit

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM API & Integration: Tasks/Defects/Requirements to Jira
entry.content:
Another observation after implementing the bi-directional integration-

1. Any task type in Cloud ALM (Project task, roadmap taak, user story, requirement, etc.) is converted into Jira Task, tak type update is given in the description of Jira, same is applicable for status.

2. To generate one to one mapping of User story to Jira user story, Requirement to Jira Epic, one will have to create mappings.

3. Status updates are also given in Jira task description, Jira task status remains unchanged with the standard mapping given. Customize mapping for status change.

entry.title: Re: Enhancement or BADI for E1IDB02 IDoc segment
entry.content: wrong

entry.title: Re: Enhancement or BADI for E1IDB02 IDoc segment
entry.content: REMADV - EXIT_SAPLIEDP_101/102

entry.title: SAP GUI Scripting after MS VBScripting Depercation?
entry.content:
MS announced in 2023 that it is in the process of deprecating VBScript (see: Deprecated features in the Windows client | Microsoft Learn). SAP GUI Scripting uses and makes calls to MS VBScript that will no longer be included in Windows OS sometime around 2027 (see MS Tech Community Blog: VBScript deprecation: Timelines and next steps | Windows IT Pro Blog). What is SAP doing to ensure all the SAP GUI Scripts that have been created will continue to work?

I've been tasked with creating some new SAP GUI Scripts and worried that they are a dead end.

Thanks,
Byron
